Stub functions for animation service operations in Pebble firmware tests.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares a set of functions related to an animation service. The functions include [`animation_service_cleanup`](<#animation_service_cleanup>), which takes a `PebbleTask` parameter, and [`animation_service_timer_event_received`](<#animation_service_timer_event_received>), which does not take any parameters. The file also includes [`animation_service_timer_schedule`](<#animation_service_timer_schedule>), which schedules a timer for a specified number of milliseconds, and two functions to control the animation service state: [`animation_service_pause`](<#animation_service_pause>) and [`animation_service_resume`](<#animation_service_resume>). The file uses the `#pragma once` directive to prevent multiple inclusions during compilation.
